SEARCH
Package neqsim.standards.oilquality

Class CrudeDesalterCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.standards.oilquality.CrudeDesalterCalculator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class CrudeDesalterCalculator extends Object implements Serializable
Crude-oil electrostatic desalter performance screening calculator.

Estimates the residual salt content of crude oil leaving a one- or two-stage electrostatic desalter using a wash-water dilution model. Each stage mixes the incoming brine with fresh wash water; the residual brine carried with the oil is diluted by the effective wash water:

  • effective wash fraction = wash-water fraction · stage efficiency;
  • per-stage dilution = residual brine / (residual brine + effective wash);
  • one stage: S_out = S_in · dilution;
  • two stages: S_out = S_in · dilution²;
  • removal efficiency = 1 - S_out / S_in.

This screening model complements Standard_ASTM_D3230, which measures salt content in crude oil.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • CrudeDesalterCalculator

      public CrudeDesalterCalculator()
      Default constructor for CrudeDesalterCalculator.

  • Method Details

    • setFeedConditions

      public void setFeedConditions(double inletSaltContentValue, double washWaterFractionValue, double mixingValveDpBar)
      Sets the feed and wash conditions.
      Parameters:
      inletSaltContentValue - inlet salt content in PTB or mg/kg (must be > 0)
      washWaterFractionValue - wash-water fraction of crude (0-1)
      mixingValveDpBar - mixing-valve pressure drop in bar (must be ≥ 0)

    • setStageConfiguration

      public void setStageConfiguration(int numberOfStagesValue, double stageEfficiencyValue, double residualBrineVolFractionValue)
      Sets the desalter stage configuration.
      Parameters:
      numberOfStagesValue - number of desalting stages (1 or 2)
      stageEfficiencyValue - per-stage water-wash efficiency (0-1)
      residualBrineVolFractionValue - residual brine volume fraction with the oil (0-1)

    • fromStreams

      public void fromStreams(StreamInterface crudeStream, StreamInterface washWaterStream, double inletSaltContentValue)
      Populates the feed conditions directly from NeqSim process crude and wash-water streams.

      Computes the wash-water fraction as the ratio of the wash-water volumetric flow to the crude volumetric flow (both streams must already have been run/flashed) and seeds the inlet salt content from the supplied measured value. The mixing-valve pressure drop and stage configuration are left unchanged so they can be configured separately via setFeedConditions(double, double, double) and setStageConfiguration(int, double, double).

      Parameters:
      crudeStream - the inlet crude-oil process stream (must not be null and must carry a fluid)
      washWaterStream - the wash-water process stream (must not be null and must carry a fluid)
      inletSaltContentValue - the measured inlet salt content in PTB (pounds of salt per thousand barrels)

    • calcPerformance

      public void calcPerformance()
      Runs the desalter performance screening calculation.

    • getEffectiveWashFraction

      public double getEffectiveWashFraction()
      Returns the effective wash-water fraction.

    • getOutletSaltContent

      Returns the outlet salt content.

    • getRemovalEfficiency

      public double getRemovalEfficiency()
      Returns the overall salt-removal efficiency.
      Returns:
      removal efficiency (0-1)

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the calculation results to a pretty-printed JSON string.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the results
